1502: export async function processWorkspaceDeployment(env: Env, workspaceId: string, deploymentId: string): Promise<void> {
1503:   const claimed = await claimWorkspaceDeploymentForExecution(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1504:   if (!claimed) {
1505:     const existing = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1506:     if (existing && existing.status !== 'queued' && existing.status !== 'running') {
1507:       try {
1508:         await reconcileWorkspaceSummaryForTerminalDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1509:       } catch (reconcileError) {
1510:         if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(reconcileError)) {
1511:           throw new QueueRetryError('Terminal deployment reconciliation failed; retry requested');
1512:         }
1513:       }
1514:       return;
1515:     }
1516: 
1517:     if (existing?.status === 'queued' && existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
1518:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
1519:       return;
1520:     }
1521: 
1522:     if (existing?.status === 'running') {
1523:       if (isRunningDeploymentStale(existing.startedAt)) {
1524:         if (existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
1525:           await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested_stale');
1526:           return;
1527:         }
1528:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
1529:           workspaceId,
1530:           errorCode: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
1531:           errorMessage: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
1532:         });
1533:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1534:           workspaceId,
1535:           deploymentId,
1536:           eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1537:           payload: {
1538:             code: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
1539:             message: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
1540:           },
1541:         });
1542:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1543:           deploymentId,
1544:           status: 'failed',
1545:           errorCode: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
1546:           errorMessage: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
1547:         });
1548:         return;
1549:       }
1550: 
1551:       if (existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
1552:         if (existing.providerDeploymentId) {
1553:           try {
1554:             const requestPayload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
1555:             const providerName = getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(requestPayload?.provider, env);
1556:             const provider = createWorkspaceDeployProvider(providerName, env);
1557:             const providerStatus = await provider.getDeploymentStatus(existing.providerDeploymentId);
1558: 
1559:             if (providerStatus.status === 'cancelled') {
1560:               await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'provider_cancelled');
1561:               return;
1562:             }
1563: 
1564:             if (providerStatus.status === 'succeeded') {
1565:               if (!existing.sourceSnapshotSha256 || !existing.sourceBundleKey) {
1566:                 throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment success metadata not yet available; retry requested');
1567:               }
1568:               const deployedUrl = providerStatus.deployedUrl ?? existing.deployedUrl ?? null;
1569:               const existingResult =
1570:                 existing.result && typeof existing.result === 'object' && !Array.isArray(existing.result)
1571:                   ? (existing.result as Record<string, unknown>)
1572:                   : {};
1573:               const successResult = {
1574:                 ...existingResult,
1575:                 url: deployedUrl,
1576:                 reconciled: true,
1577:                 fromCancelRequested: true,
1578:               };
1579:               await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'succeeded', {
1580:                 workspaceId,
1581:                 deployedUrl,
1582:                 providerDeploymentId: existing.providerDeploymentId,
1583:                 sourceSnapshotSha256: existing.sourceSnapshotSha256,
1584:                 sourceBundleKey: existing.sourceBundleKey,
1585:                 result: successResult,
1586:                 errorCode: null,
1587:                 errorMessage: null,
1588:               });
1589:               await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1590:                 workspaceId,
1591:                 deploymentId,
1592:                 eventType: 'deployment_succeeded',
1593:                 payload: {
1594:                   deployedUrl,
1595:                   reconciled: true,
1596:                   fromCancelRequested: true,
1597:                 },
1598:               });
1599:               await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1600:                 deploymentId,
1601:                 status: 'succeeded',
1602:                 deployedUrl,
1603:                 errorCode: null,
1604:                 errorMessage: null,
1605:               });
1606:               return;
1607:             }
1608: 
1609:             if (providerStatus.status === 'failed') {
1610:               const errorCode = providerStatus.errorCode ?? 'provider_deploy_failed';
1611:               const errorMessage = providerStatus.errorMessage ?? 'Provider deployment failed';
1612:               await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
1613:                 workspaceId,
1614:                 errorCode,
1615:                 errorMessage,
1616:               });
1617:               await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1618:                 workspaceId,
1619:                 deploymentId,
1620:                 eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1621:                 payload: { code: errorCode, message: errorMessage },
1622:               });
1623:               await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1624:                 deploymentId,
1625:                 status: 'failed',
1626:                 errorCode,
1627:                 errorMessage,
1628:               });
1629:               return;
1630:             }
1631:           } catch {
1632:             // Best-effort reconciliation only.
1633:           }
1634:         }
1635: 
1636:         throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment cancel requested while running; wait for active attempt to reconcile');
1637:       }
1638: 
1639:       throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment is already running; defer redelivery');
1640:     }
1641:     return;
1642:   }
1643: 
1644:   try {
1645:     const flags = await loadRuntimeFlags(env);
1646:     if (!flags.workspaceDeployEnabled) {
1647:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
1648:         workspaceId,
1649:         errorCode: 'workspace_deploy_disabled',
1650:         errorMessage: 'Workspace deploy is disabled',
1651:       });
1652:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1653:         workspaceId,
1654:         deploymentId,
1655:         eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1656:         payload: { code: 'workspace_deploy_disabled', message: 'Workspace deploy is disabled' },
1657:       });
1658:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1659:         deploymentId,
1660:         status: 'failed',
1661:         errorCode: 'workspace_deploy_disabled',
1662:         errorMessage: 'Workspace deploy is disabled',
1663:       });
1664:       return;
1665:     }
1666: 
1667:     await executeWorkspaceDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1668:   } catch (error) {
1669:     const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1670:     if (deployment && deployment.status !== 'queued' && deployment.status !== 'running') {
1671:       try {
1672:         await reconcileWorkspaceSummaryForTerminalDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1673:       } catch (reconcileError) {
1674:         if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(reconcileError)) {
1675:           throw new QueueRetryError('Terminal deployment reconciliation failed; retry requested');
1676:         }
1677:       }
1678:       return;
1679:     }
1680: 
1681:     if (error instanceof CancelRequestedError) {
1682:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
1683:       return;
1684:     }
1685: 
1686:     if (error instanceof PolicyError) {
1687:       const rollbackOnFailure = parseBoolean(
1688:         (await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId))?.rollbackOnFailure,
1689:         true
1690:       );
1691:       const rollback = await resolveRollbackContextSafely(workspaceId, deploymentId, rollbackOnFailure, env);
1692: 
1693:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
1694:         workspaceId,
1695:         errorCode: error.code,
1696:         errorMessage: error.message,
1697:         result: { rollback },
1698:       });
1699:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1700:         workspaceId,
1701:         deploymentId,
1702:         eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1703:         payload: { code: error.code, message: error.message, rollback },
1704:       });
1705:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1706:         deploymentId,
1707:         status: 'failed',
1708:         errorCode: error.code,
1709:         errorMessage: error.message,
1710:       });
1711:       return;
1712:     }
1713: 
1714:     const attemptCount = deployment?.attemptCount ?? 0;
1715:     const maxRetries = deployment?.maxRetries ?? 0;
1716:     if ((error instanceof QueueRetryError || isTransientFailure(error)) && attemptCount <= maxRetries) {
1717:       const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1718:       if (latest?.cancelRequestedAt) {
1719:         let shouldCancelLocally = true;
1720:         let cancelAcceptedByProvider = false;
1721:         const requestPayload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
1722:         const providerName = getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(requestPayload?.provider, env);
1723: 
1724:         if (latest.providerDeploymentId) {
1725:           try {
1726:             const provider = createWorkspaceDeployProvider(providerName, env);
1727:             const cancel = await provider.cancelDeployment(latest.providerDeploymentId);
1728:             await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1729:               workspaceId,
1730:               deploymentId,
1731:               eventType: 'deployment_provider_cancel_requested',
1732:               payload: {
1733:                 providerDeploymentId: latest.providerDeploymentId,
1734:                 accepted: cancel.accepted,
1735:                 retryPath: true,
1736:               },
1737:             });
1738:             if (cancel.accepted) {
1739:               cancelAcceptedByProvider = true;
1740:               shouldCancelLocally = false;
1741:             } else {
1742:               await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1743:                 workspaceId,
1744:                 deploymentId,
1745:                 eventType: 'deployment_cancel_rejected',
1746:                 payload: {
1747:                   providerDeploymentId: latest.providerDeploymentId,
1748:                   retryPath: true,
1749:                 },
1750:               });
1751:               shouldCancelLocally = false;
1752:             }
1753:           } catch (providerCancelError) {
1754:             if (providerCancelError instanceof QueueRetryError) {
1755:               throw providerCancelError;
1756:             }
1757:             const providerError = normalizeProviderError(providerCancelError);
1758:             if (isRetryableProviderError(providerError.code, providerError.message)) {
1759:               throw new QueueRetryError('Provider cancel status is temporarily unavailable; retry requested');
1760:             }
1761:             throw new PolicyError(providerError.code, providerError.message);
1762:           }
1763:         }
1764: 
1765:         if (cancelAcceptedByProvider) {
1766:           throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment cancel requested while running; wait for active attempt to reconcile');
1767:         }
1768: 
1769:         if (shouldCancelLocally) {
1770:           await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
1771:           return;
1772:         }
1773:       }
1774: 
1775:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'queued', {
1776:         workspaceId,
1777:         startedAt: null,
1778:         finishedAt: null,
1779:         errorCode: 'retry_scheduled',
1780:         errorMessage: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
1781:       });
1782:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1783:         workspaceId,
1784:         deploymentId,
1785:         eventType: 'deployment_retry_scheduled',
1786:         payload: { attemptCount, maxRetries },
1787:       });
1788:       throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment transient failure; retry requested');
1789:     }
1790: 
1791:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
1792:     const rollbackOnFailure = parseBoolean(
1793:       (await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId))?.rollbackOnFailure,
1794:       true
1795:     );
1796:     const rollback = await resolveRollbackContextSafely(workspaceId, deploymentId, rollbackOnFailure, env);
1797: 
1798:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
1799:       workspaceId,
1800:       errorCode: 'deployment_failed',
1801:       errorMessage: message,
1802:       result: { rollback },
1803:     });
1804:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1805:       workspaceId,
1806:       deploymentId,
1807:       eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1808:       payload: {
1809:         code: 'deployment_failed',
1810:         message,
1811:         rollback,
1812:       },
1813:     });
1814:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1815:       deploymentId,
1816:       status: 'failed',
1817:       errorCode: 'deployment_failed',
1818:       errorMessage: message,
1819:     });

(Showing lines 1500-1819 of 2063. Use offset=1820 to continue.)
</content>

<content>1820:   }
1821: }
1822: 
1823: export async function runWorkspaceDeploymentInlineWithRetries(
1824:   env: Env,
1825:   workspaceId: string,
1826:   deploymentId: string,
1827:   maxCycles = 8
1828: ): Promise<void> {
1829:   async function reconcileInlineCancelRequestedRunningDeployment(): Promise<boolean> {
1830:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1831:     if (!latest || latest.status !== 'running' || !latest.cancelRequestedAt) {
1832:       return false;
1833:     }
1834: 
1835:     if (!latest.providerDeploymentId) {
1836:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested_inline');
1837:       return true;
1838:     }
1839: 
1840:     try {
1841:       const requestPayload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
1842:       const providerName = getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(requestPayload?.provider, env);
1843:       const provider = createWorkspaceDeployProvider(providerName, env);
1844:       const providerStatus = await provider.getDeploymentStatus(latest.providerDeploymentId);
1845: 
1846:       if (providerStatus.status === 'cancelled') {
1847:         await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'provider_cancelled');
1848:         return true;
1849:       }
1850: 
1851:       if (providerStatus.status === 'succeeded') {
1852:         if (!latest.sourceSnapshotSha256 || !latest.sourceBundleKey) {
1853:           return false;
1854:         }
1855:         const deployedUrl = providerStatus.deployedUrl ?? latest.deployedUrl ?? null;
1856:         const latestResult =
1857:           latest.result && typeof latest.result === 'object' && !Array.isArray(latest.result)
1858:             ? (latest.result as Record<string, unknown>)
1859:             : {};
1860:         const successResult = {
1861:           ...latestResult,
1862:           url: deployedUrl,
1863:           reconciled: true,
1864:           fromInlineCancelRequested: true,
1865:         };
1866:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'succeeded', {
1867:           workspaceId,
1868:           deployedUrl,
1869:           providerDeploymentId: latest.providerDeploymentId,
1870:           sourceSnapshotSha256: latest.sourceSnapshotSha256,
1871:           sourceBundleKey: latest.sourceBundleKey,
1872:           result: successResult,
1873:           errorCode: null,
1874:           errorMessage: null,
1875:         });
1876:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1877:           workspaceId,
1878:           deploymentId,
1879:           eventType: 'deployment_succeeded',
1880:           payload: {
1881:             deployedUrl,
1882:             reconciled: true,
1883:             fromInlineCancelRequested: true,
1884:           },
1885:         });
1886:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1887:           deploymentId,
1888:           status: 'succeeded',
1889:           deployedUrl,
1890:           errorCode: null,
1891:           errorMessage: null,
1892:         });
1893:         return true;
1894:       }
1895: 
1896:       if (providerStatus.status === 'failed') {
1897:         const errorCode = providerStatus.errorCode ?? 'provider_deploy_failed';
1898:         const errorMessage = providerStatus.errorMessage ?? 'Provider deployment failed';
1899:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
1900:           workspaceId,
1901:           errorCode,
1902:           errorMessage,
1903:         });
1904:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1905:           workspaceId,
1906:           deploymentId,
1907:           eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1908:           payload: { code: errorCode, message: errorMessage },
1909:         });
1910:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1911:           deploymentId,
1912:           status: 'failed',
1913:           errorCode,
1914:           errorMessage,
1915:         });
1916:         return true;
1917:       }
1918:     } catch {
1919:       // Best-effort inline reconciliation only.
1920:     }
1921: 
1922:     return false;
1923:   }
1924: 
1925:   async function recoverInlineRunningDeployment(): Promise<boolean> {
1926:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1927:     if (!latest || latest.status !== 'running') {
1928:       return false;
1929:     }
1930: 
1931:     if (latest.cancelRequestedAt) {
1932:       return false;
1933:     }
1934: 
1935:     if (latest.attemptCount > latest.maxRetries) {
1936:       return false;
1937:     }
1938: 
1939:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'queued', {
1940:       workspaceId,
1941:       startedAt: null,
1942:       finishedAt: null,
1943:       errorCode: 'retry_scheduled',
1944:       errorMessage: 'Recovered inline deployment retry after transient failure',
1945:     });
1946:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1947:       workspaceId,
1948:       deploymentId,
1949:       eventType: 'deployment_retry_scheduled',
1950:       payload: { attemptCount: latest.attemptCount, maxRetries: latest.maxRetries, recoveredInline: true },
1951:     });
1952:     return true;
1953:   }
1954: 
1955:   for (let cycle = 0; cycle < maxCycles; cycle += 1) {
1956:     let retryableErrorRaised = false;
1957:     try {
1958:       await processWorkspaceDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1959:     } catch (error) {
1960:       if (error instanceof QueueRetryError && /cancel requested while running/i.test(error.message)) {
1961:         if (cycle < maxCycles - 1) {
1962:           await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 1000));
1963:           continue;
1964:         }
1965: 
1966:         const reconciled = await reconcileInlineCancelRequestedRunningDeployment();
1967:         if (!reconciled) {
1968:           await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'queued', {
1969:             workspaceId,
1970:             startedAt: null,
1971:             finishedAt: null,
1972:             errorCode: 'retry_scheduled',
1973:             errorMessage: 'Inline cancel reconciliation deferred; retry scheduled',
1974:           });
1975:           await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1976:             workspaceId,
1977:             deploymentId,
1978:             eventType: 'deployment_retry_scheduled',
1979:             payload: {
1980:               attemptCount: null,
1981:               maxRetries: null,
1982:               inlineCancelReconcileDeferred: true,
1983:             },
1984:           });
1985:         }
1986:         return;
1987:       }
1988: 
1989:       if (error instanceof QueueRetryError && /already running; defer redelivery/i.test(error.message)) {
1990:         return;
1991:       }
1992: 
1993:       if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(error)) {
1994:         retryableErrorRaised = true;
1995:         try {
1996:           const recovered = await recoverInlineRunningDeployment();
1997:           if (recovered) {
1998:             continue;
1999:           }
2000:         } catch {
2001:           // Best-effort inline recovery only.
2002:         }
2003:       }
2004:     }
2005: 
2006:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
2007:     if (!latest) {
2008:       return;
2009:     }
2010:     if (latest.status !== 'queued') {
2011:       return;
2012:     }
2013:     if (retryableErrorRaised) {
2014:       continue;
2015:     }
2016:     if (latest.error?.code !== 'retry_scheduled') {
2017:       return;
2018:     }
2019:   }
2020: }
2021: 
2022: export async function cancelWorkspaceDeployment(
2023:   env: Env,
2024:   workspaceId: string,
2025:   deploymentId: string
2026: ): Promise<{ updated: boolean; deployment: Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getWorkspaceDeployment>> }> {
2027:   const result = await requestWorkspaceDeploymentCancel(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
2028:   if (result.updated && result.deployment?.status === 'cancelled') {
2029:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
2030:       workspaceId,
2031:       deploymentId,
2032:       eventType: 'deployment_cancelled',
2033:       payload: { reason: 'cancel_requested' },
2034:     });
2035:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
2036:       deploymentId,
2037:       status: 'cancelled',
2038:       errorCode: null,
2039:       errorMessage: null,
2040:     });
2041:   }
2042:   if (result.updated && result.deployment?.status === 'running') {
2043:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
2044:       workspaceId,
2045:       deploymentId,
2046:       eventType: 'deployment_cancel_requested',
2047:       payload: { cancelRequestedAt: result.deployment.cancelRequestedAt },
2048:     });
2049:   }
2050:   return result;

2052: 
2053: export function shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(error: unknown): boolean {
2054:   if (error instanceof QueueRetryError) {
2055:     return true;
2056:   }
2057:   if (isTransientFailure(error)) {
2058:     return true;
2059:   }
2060: 
2061:   const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
2062:   return /(d1|database is locked|sqlite_busy|temporarily unavailable|connection reset)/i.test(message);
2063: }

parts.text:
Blocking issue found.

- `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1569` and `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1856` (both provider-succeeded reconciliation paths) build `successResult` by spreading `existing.result`/`latest.result` and only overriding `url` + reconcile flags. If that stored `result_json` is missing or partial (e.g. older in-flight deployments, partial writes, legacy rows), the reconciled success record can still end up without the normal-path `artifact`/`provenance` payload shape.  
  - This violates parity with the normal success path (`successResultTemplate` at `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1112`) and can leave downstream consumers without required metadata despite a `succeeded` terminal state.
  - Because this is exactly the metadata-completeness guarantee being validated, I consider this blocking.
